content:
Task
Complete the task in Galaxy and produce the required outputs.
- Objective: Create a new history in Galaxy and upload the datasets. Train a machine learning model to predict the response variable based on the given training dataset and evaluate its performance on the test dataset.

Attachments
- Chowell_train_Response.tsv (training_dataset; tsv)
- Chowell_test_Response.tsv (test_dataset; tsv)

Suggested Galaxy Resources
- Galaxy instance: https://usegalaxy.org/
- Focus hint: Tabular Learner

Requirements
- Use only the listed inputs and Galaxy-native resources relevant to the task.
- Adapt any retrieved tutorial or workflow to the current inputs instead of copying it blindly.
- Choose a valid Galaxy workflow or tool path and name only decisive parameters.
- Use reasonable defaults when the task does not specify them.
- Verify the final artifacts before reporting the requested fields.

Return
- `tool_name`: the tool used in galaxy
- `target`: look in the parameters of the report for the target and its value
- `roc_auc`: look in the test summary for the ROC-AUC value
